The '''''Acceptance''''' was a [[Judicial Forces/Legends|Judicial Forces]] [[Consular-class light cruiser/Legends|''Consular''-class cruiser]] piloted by [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Antidar Williams/Legends|Antidar Williams]]. It was one of the transports at the [[Battle of Galidraan]], and Jedi Master [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku's]] flagship. It was destroyed at the [[Battle of Uhanayih]], though Williams and [[Maoi Madakor/Legends|Maoi Madakor]] escaped.

==Behind the scenes==
According to ''[[What's The Story?]]'' author [[Ian Tapley]], the ''Acceptance'' is "the big one in the foreground on the page with [[Tor Vizsla|Viszla]] (sic) and [[Governor of Galidraan|the Governor]]!" in [[Jango Fett: Open Seasons 3|''Jango Fett: Open Seasons'' 3]].<ref name="blog">{{Blog|thefragrantwookiee|46|Lt. Antidar Williams: A 'What's the Story?' Story}}</ref>
